candidate_definitions.text: Node.js test runner that lets you develop with confidence 🚀
ava — Node.js test runner that lets you develop with confidence.
The Black shade analyser and comparison tool.
Foundry is a blazing fast, portable and modular toolkit for Ethereum application development written in Rust.
The pytest framework makes it easy to write small tests, yet scales to support complex functional testing
'go test' runner with output optimized for humans, JUnit XML for CI integration, and a summary of the test results.
`gotestsum` runs tests using `go test -json`, prints formatted test output, and a summary of the test run.
CLI tool for linting and testing Helm charts
A tool for formatting Go test results as readable documentation
The Claude Agent Skill for Terraform and OpenTofu - testing, modules, CI/CD, and production patterns
Yet another json parser serializer for ABAP
Core traits and libraries extracted from Foundry, published as crates so they can be depended on without git references.
Core libraries extracted from [Foundry](https://github.com/foundry-rs/foundry), published as standalone crates.
The property-based testing library for Python
A Jest transformer with source map support that lets you use Jest to test projects written in TypeScript.
Kyua is a **testing framework** for infrastructure software, originally
Hive is a system for running integration tests against Ethereum clients.
This tool must be run from the folder where an executable `minigzip` or `minideflate` exist.\
The fuzzer afl++ is afl with community patches, qemu 5.1 upgrade, collision-free coverage, enhanced laf-intel & redqueen, AFLfast++ power schedules, MOpt mutators, unicorn_mode, and a lot more!
JavaScript API for Chrome and Firefox
Ethers extension for the GanacheProvider which provides a simple interface to a Ganache in-memory Ethereum instance.

A collection of panel configurations and persona system prompts for [Rally](https://askrally.com) - a platform for creating virtual focus groups comprised of AI agents representing diverse perspectives.
Test suites for Web platform specs — including WHATWG, W3C, and others
A next-generation test runner for Rust.
Nextest is a next-generation test runner for Rust. For more information, **check out [the website](https://nexte.st/)**.
Catch2, Google Test and doctest Adapter for the VSCode

Running speech to text model (whisper.cpp) in Unity3d on your local machine.
A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)
A small test framework to write your own test harness that looks and behaves like the built-in test harness used by `rustc --test`
The fastest feature-rich C++11/14/17/20/23 single-header testing framework
syzkaller is an unsupervised coverage-guided kernel fuzzer
A Kurtosis package that deploys a private, portable, and modular Ethereum devnet
spam EVM execution nodes over JSON-RPC & run benchmarks
Package for comparing Go values in tests
The Go language implementation of gRPC. HTTP/2 based RPC
A modern, C++11-native, single-file header-only, tiny framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD (includes C++98 variant)
Minimalistic Rust toolkit for hash function quality analysis. Tests avalanche effect, differential patterns, and statistical distribution across variable-length n-grams.
Playwright is a framework for Web Testing and Automation. It allows testing Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.

BDD styled unit test framework for Kubernetes Helm charts as a Helm plugin.
Evalution: evolve your LLMs with better evals.
A tool for generating code based on a GraphQL schema and GraphQL operations (query/mutation/subscription), with flexible support for custom plugins.
